latin: Quinque discipuli, qui ad poenam in scholam die Saturni venerant, tandem intellexerunt se non tam diversos esse. unus dixit: 'omnes satis miri sumus. quidam autem miratiores sunt quam ceteri.'

questions.prompt: Why are the five students at school on Saturday?
What realization do they come to?
questions.target: They are all pretty bizarre, not so different from each other
choices: They are all pretty bizarre, not so different from each other

questions.prompt: What nuance does one student add?
questions.target: Some are more bizarre than others
choices: Some are more bizarre than others
They need to change their ways

translation: Five students, who had come to school on Saturday for punishment, finally understood they were not so different. One said: 'We are all pretty bizarre. But some are more bizarre than others.'
